hero.title: A lightweight, high-performance Vue 3 editor component library based on CodeMirror 6.

performance.title: Powered by CodeMirror 6
performance.desc: Provides robust foundational editing capabilities and excellent performance for large documents.

vue3.title: Vue 3 Friendly
vue3.desc: Built entirely with the Composition API, perfectly fitting the Vue ecosystem.

typeSafe.title: Type Safe
typeSafe.desc: 100% written in TypeScript with complete type inference for better developer experience.

vite.title: Vite Driven
vite.desc: Lightning-fast local development and build experience powered by Vite.

hybridMarkdown.title: Hybrid Markdown
hybridMarkdown.desc: Optional hybrid rendering mode offering instant WYSIWYG preview within the editor.

vimMode.title: Vim Mode Support
vimMode.desc: Built-in classic Vim modal editing and keybindings for power users.
